name: sveltedraw-monorepo
// Transitive runtime deps: The Svelte port at `packages/excalidraw-svelte/` is pure-Svelte, but it imports from `@excalidraw/excalidraw/{appState,scene,renderer,data,...}` which pulls `packages/excalidraw/clipboard.ts`, `types.ts` et al. into the bundle. A handful of those TS files still transitively import from `packages/excalidraw/editor-jotai.ts` (→ `jotai-scope` → `react/jsx-runtime`) through import chains Rollup resolves but never actually executes. Keeping these as dependencies satisfies module resolution until we do a proper Phase-9 deep-clean of `packages/excalidraw/` (delete components/, actions/, hooks/, engine/ — React-only code paths the Svelte port never touches).

scripts.build:packages: yarn build:common && yarn build:math && yarn build:element && yarn build:excalidraw
scripts.test:all: yarn test:typecheck && yarn test:other && yarn test:app --watch=false
